design.candidate_discovery: unique strong nearby fixture candidate only
design.post_alias_attachment: exact mapped home-away pair + unique nearest fixture + both pre-match xG states

xg_research_coverage_gate.next_if_pass: freeze alias table then test xG incremental information for direct P(T) and conditional P(D|T,X)
xg_research_coverage_gate.next_if_fail: do not fit xG model; inspect remaining identity rejects / missing source coverage
